STIPULATION STIPULATION STAYING DISCOVERY PENDING RESOLUTION OF CRIMINAL ACTION. THERE PRESENTLY EXISTS ONE OR MORE CRIMINAL ACTINS THAT ARE BEING PROSECUTED BY THE SAN FRANCISCO DISTRIC ATTORNEY'S OFFICE AGAINST DEFENDANTS HEREIN INCLUDING MUEEN GHANMA AND MOHAMMED ABDEL. THE CRIMINAL ACTIONS ARISE OUT OF THE SAME FACTS AS SET FORTH IN PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT. IN RECOGNITION OF THE FACT THAT THE CRIMINAL CASE IS PENDING AND BOTH DEFENDANTS HAVE ASSERTED THEIR FIFTH AMENDMENT CONSTITUTIONAL RIGHT AGAINST SELF-INCRIMINATION IN RESPONSTE TO DISCOVERY PROPOUNDED BY PLAINTIFF PITT FILED BY PITTSBURG WHOLESALE GROCERS,INC AKA PITCO
